ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Last trade price of the stock */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade */,
  "fifty_two_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "fifty_two_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Annual dividend yield */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "ex_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Payment date */,
  "amount" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the dividend */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was declared */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1) */,
  "pre_split_price" REAL /* Stock price before the split */,
  "post_split_price" REAL /* Stock price after the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio position */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price per share */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the position */,
  "realized_gain_loss" REAL /* Realized gain or loss on the position */,
  "unrealized_gain_loss" REAL /* Unrealized gain or loss on the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_positions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value to trigger the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is active */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the user action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
